Lew's Tracker v8.5

Track Build Deliver

Mobile-ready offline tracker — BIM tasks, focus time, calendar, notes, budgets, and backups. With per-task time logging, recurring tasks, global search, and silent email backup.

Scroll to explore
01 · Mobile

Built for
your phone.

5-tab nav that collapses secondary sections into a "More" sheet. Board view swipes horizontally. Content is never blocked by the FAB or pet widget. Installs as a home screen app.

📊 Dashboard4 open · 1 overdue
☑ Review modelHigh · BIM
📅 Jun 6 — 2 tasks
⌂□◎◇⋯

5-tab mobile nav · Board swipe · Safe area

02 · Melliea

Inspired
by Melliea.

This tracker carries a quiet dedication to my wife — the heart behind so many of my best days. Her love gives ordinary moments meaning, her patience brings calm when life feels heavy, and her belief in me turns effort into courage.

♡

"For Melliea — my inspiration, my peace, and my reason to keep becoming better."

03 · To Do

Smarter
task rows.

Priority border stripes, subtask progress on every row, per-task time logging, recurring task support (↺ weekly, monthly), and 5-second undo when you delete.

Review ceiling model v3 ⏱ 1h 22m
Clash coordination 3/4
Prepare RFI-044 ↺ weekly
Update BEP document
04 · Focus

Ring timer +
screensaver.

The circular SVG countdown ring depletes as time runs. Tap your local time to open the immersive 3D fullscreen clock with three styles — orbital rings, wireframe globe, or star field.

05 · Finance

Currency-aware
budgets.

Each budget has its own currency (QAR, PHP, AED, USD and more). Tick items as paid — paid rows turn green, pending stay amber. Silent email backup every 7 days if configured.

Housing
QR 2,400 ✓

QR 800 ⏳

QR 8,500

QR 1,500 ✓
■ Paid ■ Pending ■ Income
06 · Appearance

Theme packs
+ picker.

Four theme packs (Gold, Ocean, Forest, Charcoal) plus a full color picker. Glassmorphism toggle, auto dark/light from system preference, compact mode, font selector, and panel radius control.

Gold
Ocean
Forest
Charcoal
Custom color picker + 5 presets

You're all set.

Everything you need to track, focus, and deliver — right here. Let's go.

Workflow & Backup








Lew's Tracker uses browser cache for speed. Select a storage folder to keep data and attachments outside browser storage.

Folder Storage

Choose a folder on this device. The tracker will create top-level folders by tab name. To Do List gets one folder per task using the task name, with attachments and task-details.txt inside each task folder. Notes, Templates, Calendar, Finance, Focus, Insights, Dashboard, and Settings also get their own tab folders.

No folder selected — using browser cache only
